research_topic: grid-scale energy storage options for mid-sized cities
audience: city planners evaluating a 2030 resilience roadmap
research_mission: Identify which grid-scale energy storage technologies deserve deeper procurement analysis and which claims remain weakly evidenced. Treat the brief as a planning input for decisions over the next 18 months while considering infrastructure relevance through 2030.
known_context: The city has rising summer peak demand, wildfire-related outage risk, limited downtown land, and political pressure to improve resilience without locking into immature technology. Missing location-specific inputs include load profiles, interconnection limits, land availability, tariff design, outage-duration targets, permitting constraints, critical loads, budget, ownership model, and political risk tolerance.
